2026-04-16T07:49:31.6350777Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6351344Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6351790Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6352157Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6352471Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6352710Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6352868Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6353045Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6353214Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6353448Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6353657Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6353949Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:31.6354523Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
